26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @mnfriesen made this badass shirt. Awesome work. Check out their posts for more!
27 Man Tax: Jason Momoa
“We all live under the same sky, but we don't all have the same horizon.” - Konrad Adenauer So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Rep. Jim McGovern (@RepMcGovern): As if you think he couldn't reach a new low, Trump is now fundraising off dead American soldiers. It's one of the most depraved things I've ever seen in American politics.
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: I was reminded of this video today and looked for it again
item.description: I recently said that I focus on the potential of the relationship rather than the person's flaws. That may have burnt me, but I'll continue believing that it's better to lead with love as best I can.
item.dc:creator: unwaver

item.title: Here's some bottom shelf memes I found stuck in the return slot at a closed Blockbuster
item.description:
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
I call it The Roommate Files™ https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hJs0yZvE5JyncwileG37uwMA49JRfAXii_gniklRvY8/edit?usp=drivesdk
This dump was brought to you by the meme addicted insomniacs from the Bottom Shelf Community where we shitpost 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We stream games on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Potato tax
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: The absolutely wild tone-deafness and lack of self-awareness is bolstered by cognitive dissonance, selective perception, and confirmation bias.
item.description: And these weirdos want the rapture. Trump might give it to them.

item.title: Tried another experiment — this time with warm evening light and flowing dresses
item.description: Thanks for the warm welcome. It’s been really nice sharing my work here and reading your comments in last post) I’m still pretty new here, so any tips on how to improve my posts are always appreciated. If anyone is interested in seeing more of my work: Patreon — https://patreon.com/catarsic?utm_source=imgur Instagram — https://www.instagram.com/catarsic/

item.title: Memes vol 641
item.description:
Jesus Christ dude
Restaurants that serve babies
I think heated rivalry is erotic. And really really good.
I hope to one day be as funny as this person
Bruce and Gertie tax. Hey guys I just wanted to let you know that Paulie died. He had a foreign body blockage and we couldn’t afford the surgery. I might post about it more someday but I just wanted to let everyone know
Nessie tax
item.dc:creator: danat101

item.title: I almost got squished by a run away semi
item.description: While waiting for the car in front of me to make the turn, i was getting a bit impatient. I just looked up to my rear view mirror and all of a sudden i saw Semi and Smoke. I had to GTFO then. Was still expecting the semi to clip me, but somehow he threaded the needle. Also, as people would ask, Audio Book is Brandon Sanderson's The Bands of Mourning. Book 6 is the Mistborn series. Love it!
item.dc:creator: CoopDH
